data.description: You touch a willing creature. One target you touch (or a creature within 10 feet of you that you can see) gains resistance to all damage for 1 minute.
This section covers rules for making saving throws.

This reverses gravity in a 50-foot radius, centered on point within line range. Creatures and objects aren't anchored and the area and the ground fall upward. When called into this area, creatures can make a Dexterity saving throw to grab a holding object. Time: bonus action. Range: 150 feet. If some solid object (such as ceiling) is encountered in fall, creatures and objects will strike as if under normal gravity. Duration: one minute.
Casts a lesser form of raise dead, restoring hit points to a creature instead of granting it the ability to rise from the dead.
